MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-19-2013 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) IS GRANTED. THE JURY TRIAL IS SET ON 9/30/13 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES AGREED THAT THE NOTICE PERIOD FOR A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BE NO MORE THAN 30 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND THAT THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BE PERMITTED TO BE HEARD WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF THE TRIAL DATE. (AFTER REVIEWING THE CLERK'S NOTES, THE RULING HAS BEEN CORRECTED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING: THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BE PERMITTED TO BE HEARD 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL.) WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter.

Judge Miller disclosed that she is a member of the same Inn of Court as Plaintiff's counsel Ms. Van Vleet. This will not affect Judge Miller's ability to be fair and impartial in this case, and Judge Miller believes that a person aware of the facts would not reasonably believe that she would be able to be impartial.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT PETER LIP, L.AC. MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted, with 10 days leave to amend. Ms. Boyd is granted leave to amend, if she can do so in good faith, to allege additional facts that demonstrate malicious conduct. The court signed the proposed order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PETER LIP's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff has leave to plead more facts that demonstrate malicious conduct. The Court signed the proposed order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
